pageContext.name: Giant Sized X-Men: Tribute to Wein & Cockrum (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Giant Sized X-Men: Tribute to Wein & Cockrum (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This stunning print features art by Ed Mcguinness in tribute to the legendary one-shot comic Giant-Size X-Men #1, created by writer Len Wein and illustrator Dave Cockrum. Marvel's team of magnificent mutants would never be the same, and it is fitting that such an exciting entry into the series would inspire artists to pay homage!  Limited to only 100, X-Men fans won't want to miss out on adding this print to their Marvel gallery!
